news.title:
Bernstein initiates Underperform on NTPC Green Energy, target Rs 80.
India's energy push favors thermal, nuclear over pure-play renewables.
news.summary:
Bernstein initiates Underperform on NTPC Green Energy, target Rs 80.
India's energy push favors thermal, nuclear over pure-play renewables.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy Ltd signed an MoU with Nxtra Data Limited to develop renewable energy projects.
The collaboration aims to supply round-the-clock renewable power to Nxtra's data centers in India.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy Ltd signed an MoU with Nxtra Data Limited to develop renewable energy projects.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy declared commercial operation for 165 MW of Khavda-II Solar PV Project from 19.03.2026.
This addition raises NTPC Green Energy's total installed capacity to 9727.68 MW.
news.summary:

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy stock surged 18%; plans 30 GW renewable capacity.
The renewable strategy highlights NTPC Green Energy's expansion focus.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy stock surged 18%; plans 30 GW renewable capacity.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy operationalized 91.6 MW solar in Andhra Pradesh, part of 250 MW project.
Total group capacity now stands at 9292.7 MW, with 158.4 MW previously operational.
news.summary:

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy adds 50 MW capacity at Dayapar Wind Project, Gujarat, boosting commercial operations.
This raises NTPC Green Energy's total installed capacity to 9201.1 MW from 9151.1 MW.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy adds 50 MW capacity at Dayapar Wind Project, Gujarat, boosting commercial operations.

news.title:

Total capacity now stands at 9,151.08 MW after the latest expansion.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy's 165 MW Khavda II solar project is now operational from 20 Feb 2026.
Group renewable capacity rises to 8,992.7 MW from 8,827.7 MW, boosting portfolio growth.
news.summary:

NTPC Green Energy's 125 MW Bhadla Solar PV Project's second section is now operational.
The project contributes to sustainable energy development.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy signed an MoU with Assago Industries for green ammonia, CO2, and renewable utilities.
The MoU supports a 1000 TPD green urea plant at NGEL Green Hydrogen Hub, Visakhapatnam.
news.summary:

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy Ltd hit an all-time low, closing 0.27 above its 52-week low of 84.6.
Stock shows sustained underperformance compared to the broader market and sector peers.
news.summary:

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy Ltd's 210 MW Khavda II Solar PV to be commercial by 01.02.2026.
Project boosts capacity from 8478.25 MW to 8688.25 MW, enhancing green energy output.
news.summary:

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy Q3 net profit fell to ₹175M from ₹656M YoY.
Q3 revenue rose to ₹6.5B from ₹5.05B YoY, indicating growth.
news.summary:

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy's board will meet on 29th Jan 2026 to approve Q3 and nine-month unaudited results.
Trading window closed from 1st Jan 2026, reopening 48 hours post results declaration.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy's board will meet on 29th Jan 2026 to approve Q3 and nine-month unaudited results.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy Ltd declares commercial operation of 300 MW out of 500 MW Bhadla Solar PV Project from 13.01.2026.
This addition increases NTPC Green Energy's total installed capacity to 8310.28 MW.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy Ltd declares commercial operation of 300 MW out of 500 MW Bhadla Solar PV Project from 13.01.2026.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy's 69.04 MW Khavda I Solar PV Project in Gujarat declared commercial from 25 Dec 2025.
Group capacity rises from 7,927.3 MW to 7,996.3 MW under CPSU Phase II Tranche III.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy's 69.04 MW Khavda I Solar PV Project in Gujarat declared commercial from 25 Dec 2025.
Group capacity rises from 7,927.3 MW to 7,996.3 MW under CPSU Phase II Tranche III.

news.title:
PSUs like NTPC Green Energy Ltd are partnering with states to develop 33 solar parks under the Solar Parks and Ultra Mega Solar Projects scheme, totaling 20.7 GW capacity.
Land bottlenecks remain a challenge; MNRE suggests easing land rules and single-window clearances for timely solar project execution.
news.summary:
PSUs like NTPC Green Energy Ltd are partnering with states to develop 33 solar parks under the Solar Parks and Ultra Mega Solar Projects scheme, totaling 20.7 GW capacity.
Land bottlenecks remain a challenge; MNRE suggests easing land rules and single-window clearances for timely solar project execution.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy declared 243.66 MW of the 1,255 MW Khavda-I Solar PV Project operational.
With this, NTPC Green Energy's total installed capacity rises to 7,889.3 MW.
news.summary:
